name: useStopwatch
description: Hook that creates a stopwatch functionality
examples: const { seconds, minutes, start, pause, reset } = useStopwatch(1000, { immediately: false });
const { seconds, minutes, start, pause, reset } = useStopwatch({ initialTime: 1000, immediately: false });

parameters.name: initialTime
parameters.description: The initial time of the timer

source.source: * @param {number} [initialTime=0] The initial time of the timer

tokens.name: [initialTime=0]
tokens.description: The initial time of the timer

returns.name: An
returns.description: object containing the current time and functions to interact with the timer

source.source: * @returns {UseStopwatchReturn} An object containing the current time and functions to interact with the timer
